judge.reason: Primary purpose is complex subvolume mount setup: allocate fs_info, duplicate fs_context, get superblock, reconfigure, create mount, and call mount_subvol. Contains substantial business logic (multiple allocations, error handling, and multiple function calls) far beyond a simple refcount get/put/set operation. The only refcount operation is put_fs_context used for cleanup, which is incidental and not the main purpose.
